articles.title: Google's Gemini Omni Flash hits the API, turning enterprise video production into a conversation
articles.summary: For most enterprises, a 90-second training video or a product explainer has never been an easy ask. It means a well planned brief, an internal film crew or an outside vendor, a shoot, an edit, and a round of revisions. articles.title: Morgan Stanley cut its riskiest reconciliation job in half — by making its agents less autonomous
articles.summary: Most enterprise AI deployments so far have focused on coding assistants and customer service bots. Morgan Stanley has deployed agents in one of banking's most accuracy-critical, deadline-driven workflows instead — profit and loss (P&L) reconciliation — and cut the work in half. articles.title: Superworms could replace beetles for cleaning skeletal remains
